name: Athena RPC: listDataDirectory
description: Add the listDataDirectory openpilot athenad RPC method. Takes an optional prefix string and returns a list of filenames under the device's data directory (typically /data/media/0/realdata). Reference: openpilot/system/athena/athenad.py lines 388-392 (../../openpilot/system/athena/athenad.py). Useful for inspecting what the device has locally that has not yet been uploaded.
acceptance_criteria: internal/ws/methods.go defines a ListDataDirectoryParams struct with a single optional Prefix string json:"prefix"
CallListDataDirectory(caller, client, prefix string) ([]string, error) is added; when prefix is empty, it omits the prefix param or sends an empty string (match athenad default)
RegisterDefaultHandlers installs a device-side stub that returns a small fixed list of filenames, optionally filtering by prefix
internal/ws/methods_test.go covers both the no-prefix and with-prefix cases
go vet ./... and go build ./... pass cleanly
